name: French Toast
recipeIngredient: 4 egg whites (or 4 ozs of firm tofu)
1/2 cup 1% soy milk (or water or apple juice)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the egg whites, soy milk, cinnamon, and vanilla extract in a bowl until well combined. If using tofu, puree it with the liquid in a blender, then add the seasonings and extra liquid to thin the batter as needed.
2. Lightly spray a pan with PAM and heat over medium heat.
3. Dip each piece of bread into the batter, coating both sides.
4. Cook the bread on each side until golden brown.
These were pretty good. I hadn't thought about cooking French toast until I saw the article.
